Summary: Order Flow Reliability
Description: Brokerage-grade reliability for placement, retries, and state consistency.
Acceptance Criteria: No duplicate orders under retries; deterministic state transitions.

Summary: Observability and Release Gates
Description: Production monitoring and release-quality controls for trading stability.
Acceptance Criteria: SLO dashboards and alerting active; release gates enforce critical thresholds.

Summary: Ticket and Validation Hardening
Description: Transparent pre-trade economics and deterministic rejection handling.
Acceptance Criteria: Margin and charges shown pre-trade; all rejection paths mapped in UI.

Summary: Dedicated Futures Flow
Description: End-to-end Futures trading journey from discovery to execution.
Acceptance Criteria: Futures contracts searchable and tradable with real-time position updates.

Summary: Options Strategy Safety
Description: Safer options execution with payoff and risk intelligence.
Acceptance Criteria: Strategy previews include payoff, Greeks, and risk guardrails.

Summary: Onboarding and Sell Authorization
Description: Compliance-grade account onboarding and sell authorization workflows.
Acceptance Criteria: KYC flow hardened and eDIS/TPIN path recoverable for failures.

Summary: App Security Controls
Description: Mobile and session security controls for trust and fraud resistance.
Acceptance Criteria: Session controls, pinning, and root checks active with telemetry.

Summary: SGB Module
Description: Gold bonds capability including catalog, apply, and status tracking.
Acceptance Criteria: Users can discover, apply, and track SGB allocations.

Summary: Reports and Statements
Description: Tax and statement depth for investor trust and compliance readiness.
Acceptance Criteria: Tax summary and statements available and reconcilable.

Summary: Performance and Device Quality
Description: Low-end device performance and launch stability hardening.
Acceptance Criteria: Startup and render metrics meet defined budgets.

Summary: Retention Features
Description: Intelligent alerts and watchlist features to increase active engagement.
Acceptance Criteria: Alert features improve engagement KPIs versus baseline.

Summary: Implement idempotent order placement
Description: Use idempotency keys in order API to prevent duplicate order creation on retries.
Acceptance Criteria: Repeated retries do not create duplicate orders; same key returns same order reference.

Summary: Build deterministic order lifecycle state machine
Description: Enforce allowed order status transitions in OMS and reject invalid transitions.
Acceptance Criteria: Allowed transitions are documented and enforced; invalid transitions return clear error code.

Summary: Add reconnect-safe websocket stream
Description: Implement sequence tracking and gap recovery for market and order streams.
Acceptance Criteria: Stream resumes after disconnect without duplicate events; gap recovery validated in tests.

Summary: Build SLO dashboard for orders and quotes
Description: Create dashboard and alerts for latency, error rate, and order success.
Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard exposes p95 metrics and error trends; alerts fire on threshold breach.

Summary: Add release gate checks for crash and P0 bugs
Description: Automate release blocking checks for crash-free session and unresolved P0 defects.
Acceptance Criteria: Release pipeline blocks when crash target fails or unresolved P0 issues exist.

Summary: Show pre-trade margin and charge breakdown
Description: Display complete margin and fee estimation in trade ticket before submit.
Acceptance Criteria: Margin and charges visible pre-submit; final values reconcile with tradebook.

Summary: Map all rejection reasons to user-friendly actions
Description: Translate RMS and OMS rejections into deterministic user-facing copy with next steps.
Acceptance Criteria: All rejection classes map to actionable and consistent UI messaging.

Summary: Add trace IDs from mobile to backend logs
Description: Propagate trace IDs from app to backend for support and incident debugging.
Acceptance Criteria: Support can trace failed orders in under 2 minutes using trace ID.

Summary: Implement dedicated Futures discover to ticket to order flow
Description: Ship end-to-end Futures product journey with execution and position updates.
Acceptance Criteria: Futures contracts searchable and tradable end-to-end; positions and PnL update in real time.

Summary: Add strategy payoff, Greeks, and risk warnings
Description: Add options risk intelligence to strategy builder and confirmation flow.
Acceptance Criteria: Multi-leg preview includes payoff and net Greeks; hard warnings shown for risky combinations.

Summary: Validate multi-leg payload and guardrails on backend
Description: Validate strategy legs and enforce risk checks before order acceptance.
Acceptance Criteria: Invalid leg combinations are rejected with actionable validation errors.

Summary: Harden KYC and verification flow
Description: Improve onboarding resilience with retry and clear failure handling for verification stages.
Acceptance Criteria: Verification drop-off reduced and retry path available for failed checks.

Summary: Implement eDIS and TPIN sell authorization UX
Description: Implement compliant sell authorization journey with status and retry handling.
Acceptance Criteria: Sell authorization status is transparent and recoverable when failures occur.

Summary: Add session management and suspicious-login controls
Description: Enable device session visibility, revocation, and suspicious login handling.
Acceptance Criteria: Users can view and revoke sessions; suspicious events are logged and acted on.

Summary: Add certificate pinning and root detection checks
Description: Harden release app security posture with runtime checks and telemetry.
Acceptance Criteria: Pinning and root detection active in release builds with monitoring signals.

Summary: Build SGB catalog and application flow
Description: Launch SGB discovery, application, and allocation tracking workflows.
Acceptance Criteria: Users can discover SGB options, apply, and track allocation status.

Summary: Add tax PnL summary and statement center
Description: Provide downloadable tax and account statement artifacts in app.
Acceptance Criteria: Tax summary and statements are accessible and downloadable in-app.

Summary: Add ledger and tradebook reconciliation checks
Description: Automate consistency checks between ledger, tradebook, and portfolio views.
Acceptance Criteria: Reconciliation mismatch alerts generated automatically for investigation.

Summary: Optimize startup and render for low-end devices
Description: Improve startup and rendering performance on constrained Android devices.
Acceptance Criteria: Startup and frame metrics meet target performance budgets.

Summary: Run opening-hour chaos and load tests
Description: Validate system behavior under volatility and traffic spikes.
Acceptance Criteria: Platform passes defined load and chaos scenarios for opening-hour traffic.

Summary: Add alert intelligence and watchlist scanners
Description: Implement personalized alerts and scanners to increase repeat usage.
Acceptance Criteria: D7 and D30 engagement improves against baseline after rollout.
